headline: Tesla Is Still Down 17% in 2026. Can Wednesday’s Earnings Event Get TSLA Stock Back on Track?
summary: Tesla heads into Wednesday's Q2 earnings report with a 17% year-to-date loss and a valuation that assumes autonomy will eventually justify everything. Whether this week's call rebuilds confidence or deepens the skepticism depends on a few critical numbers Wall Street is watching closely.

raw.summary: Tesla heads into Wednesday's Q2 earnings report with a 17% year-to-date loss and a valuation that assumes autonomy will eventually justify everything. Whether this week's call rebuilds confidence or deepens the skepticism depends on a few critical numbers Wall Street is watching closely.

headline: ARM, QCOM, KLAC Stocks Rise Despite Price Target Cuts By UBS Amid Chip Stocks’ Pullback
summary: ARM’s stock saw the largest price target cut, though UBS reiterated its 'Buy' rating and retained 'Neutral' ratings for both Qualcomm and KLA.

raw.headline: ARM, QCOM, KLAC Stocks Rise Despite Price Target Cuts By UBS Amid Chip Stocks’ Pullback
raw.summary: ARM’s stock saw the largest price target cut, though UBS reiterated its 'Buy' rating and retained 'Neutral' ratings for both Qualcomm and KLA.
